body.content: The MyPrograms application is a mobile app developed to help students manage their academic processes (class schedules, exams, and assignments) more efficiently. This Privacy Policy explains in a transparent way what data the application processes, how it stores it, and how it protects it.

By using the application, you are deemed to have accepted the data processing and privacy practices described herein. MyPrograms adopts user privacy as a core principle and operates with a minimal data approach whenever possible.
MyPrograms uses a ‘Local-First’ architecture. Under this approach, all user data is stored only on the user’s device and is not transmitted to external servers.
Locally Stored Data

content: Course schedules and class information
Exam dates and reminders
Assignments and personal notes
User-created planning data

body.content: All this data is stored locally on Android devices using a SQLite (Room) database. The application does not transmit any user data over the internet in its current version.
The application does not include advertisements, analytics, or user behavior tracking SDKs.
MyPrograms allows users to attach PDF, image, or other files related to their courses. This is done using the Android Storage Access Framework (SAF).

content: The application does not access all device files
Only files explicitly selected by the user are accessed
Files are not uploaded to any third-party servers
File access always requires user permission

body.content: This SAF-based approach ensures user privacy and follows a minimum-permission principle.
The application uses a local notification system for class and exam reminders. These notifications are generated on the device and are not sent to any external server.

content: Notifications run only on the user’s device
No internet connection is required
Notifications can be disabled by the user at any time

body.content: Users can export or import their data at any time within the application. This provides full control over personal data.
Since all data is stored locally on the device, the responsibility for data security and backups lies entirely with the user.

content: Data may be permanently lost if the device is deleted or reset
Users are responsible for making regular backups
The application cannot be held responsible for data loss

body.content: The MyPrograms application does not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or data collection services. However, certain third-party services may be used through the official website.
Donation System
Users can optionally support the project via donations on the official website. This process is handled through a third-party payment provider called Kreosus.

content: Kreosus service: https://kreosus.com
Payments are processed directly through Kreosus infrastructure
MyPrograms does not store or access user payment information
All payment transactions are subject to Kreosus privacy policy: https://kreosus.com/privacy

body.content: Website and Hosting
The official MyPrograms website is hosted on GitHub Pages: https://pages.github.com

content: The site is deployed as a static website via GitHub Pages
No server-side user data is processed
GitHub’s privacy policy applies: https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-privacy-statement

body.content: In the future, MyPrograms may introduce optional cloud synchronization and cross-platform support features.

content: Cloud synchronization will be completely optional (opt-in)
Offline/local usage will remain available
User data will only be synced to the cloud with explicit user consent
Cross-platform support may allow synchronization across multiple devices

body.content: MyPrograms is an education-focused application that may be used by different age groups. However, since the application does not transmit user data to servers, it does not directly collect personal data.
Users under the age of 18 are encouraged to use the application under parental or legal guardian supervision.
Users can manually delete all their data from within the application. Since no data is sent to a central server, deletion occurs entirely on the local device.
Data deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
If you have any questions or suggestions regarding this Privacy Policy, feel free to contact us.
Email: sabahattincck@outlook.com
